001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.html;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
021
022import java.util.*;
023import java.util.concurrent.*;
024import java.util.concurrent.atomic.*;
025
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml.*;
031
032/**
033 * Serializes POJO models to HTML.
034 *
035 * <h5 class='topic'>Media types</h5>
036 * <p>
037 * Handles <c>Accept</c> types:  <bc>text/html</bc>
038 * <p>
039 * Produces <c>Content-Type</c> types:  <bc>text/html</bc>
040 *
041 * <h5 class='topic'>Description</h5>
042 * <p>
043 * The conversion is as follows...
044 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
045 *    <li>
046 *       {@link Map Maps} (e.g. {@link HashMap}, {@link TreeMap}) and beans are converted to HTML tables with
047 *       'key' and 'value' columns.
048 *    <li>
049 *       {@link Collection Collections} (e.g. {@link HashSet}, {@link LinkedList}) and Java arrays are converted
050 *       to HTML ordered lists.
051 *    <li>
052 *       {@code Collections} of {@code Maps} and beans are converted to HTML tables with keys as headers.
053 *    <li>
054 *       Everything else is converted to text.
055 * </ul>
056 *
057 * <p>
058 * This serializer provides several serialization options.  Typically, one of the predefined <jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>
059 * serializers will be sufficient.
060 * However, custom serializers can be constructed to fine-tune behavior.
061 *
062 * <p>
063 * The {@link HtmlLink} annotation can be used on beans to add hyperlinks to the output.
064 *
065 * <h5 class='topic'>Behavior-specific subclasses</h5>
066 * <p>
067 * The following direct subclasses are provided for convenience:
068 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
069 *    <li>
070 *       {@link Sq} - Default serializer, single quotes.
071 *    <li>
072 *       {@link SqReadable} - Default serializer, single quotes, whitespace added.
073 * </ul>
074 *
075 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
076 * <p class='bjava'>
077 *    <jc>// Use one of the default serializers to serialize a POJO</jc>
078 *    String <jv>html</jv> = HtmlSerializer.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.serialize(<jv>someObject</jv>);
079 *
080 *    <jc>// Create a custom serializer that doesn't use whitespace and newlines</jc>
081 *    HtmlSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = HtmlSerializer.<jsm>create</jsm>().ws().build();
082 *
083 *    <jc>// Same as above, except uses cloning</jc>
084 *    HtmlSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = HtmlSerializer.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.copy().ws().build();
085 *
086 *    <jc>// Serialize POJOs to HTML</jc>
087 *
088 *    <jc>// Produces: </jc>
089 *    <jc>// &lt;ul&gt;&lt;li&gt;1&lt;li&gt;2&lt;li&gt;3&lt;/ul&gt;</jc>
090 *    List <jv>list</jv> = JsonList.<jsm>of</jsm>(1, 2, 3);
091 *    String <jv>html</jv> = HtmlSerializer.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.serialize(<jv>list</jv>);
092 *
093 *    <jc>// Produces: </jc>
094 *    <jc>//    &lt;table&gt; </jc>
095 *    <jc>//       &lt;tr&gt;&lt;th&gt;firstName&lt;/th&gt;&lt;th&gt;lastName&lt;/th&gt;&lt;/tr&gt; </jc>
096 *    <jc>//       &lt;tr&gt;&lt;td&gt;Bob&lt;/td&gt;&lt;td&gt;Costas&lt;/td&gt;&lt;/tr&gt; </jc>
097 *    <jc>//       &lt;tr&gt;&lt;td&gt;Billy&lt;/td&gt;&lt;td&gt;TheKid&lt;/td&gt;&lt;/tr&gt; </jc>
098 *    <jc>//       &lt;tr&gt;&lt;td&gt;Barney&lt;/td&gt;&lt;td&gt;Miller&lt;/td&gt;&lt;/tr&gt; </jc>
099 *    <jc>//    &lt;/table&gt; </jc>
100 *    <jv>html</jv> = JsonList.<jsm>of</jsm>(
101 *       JsonMap.<jsm>ofText</jsm>(<js>"{firstName:'Bob',lastName:'Costas'}"</js>),
102 *       JsonMap.<jsm>ofText</jsm>(<js>"{firstName:'Billy',lastName:'TheKid'}"</js>),
103 *       JsonMap.<jsm>ofText</jsm>(<js>"{firstName:'Barney',lastName:'Miller'}"</js>)
104 *    );
105 *    String <jv>html</jv> = HtmlSerializer.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.serialize(<jv>list</jv>);
106 *
107 *    <jc>// Produces: </jc>
108 *    <jc>//    &lt;table&gt; </jc>
109 *    <jc>//       &lt;tr&gt;&lt;th&gt;key&lt;/th&gt;&lt;th&gt;value&lt;/th&gt;&lt;/tr&gt; </jc>
110 *    <jc>//       &lt;tr&gt;&lt;td&gt;foo&lt;/td&gt;&lt;td&gt;bar&lt;/td&gt;&lt;/tr&gt; </jc>
111 *    <jc>//       &lt;tr&gt;&lt;td&gt;baz&lt;/td&gt;&lt;td&gt;123&lt;/td&gt;&lt;/tr&gt; </jc>
112 *    <jc>//    &lt;/table&gt; </jc>
113 *    Map <jv>map</jv> = JsonMap.<jsm>ofText</jsm>(<js>"{foo:'bar',baz:123}"</js>);
114 *    String <jv>html</jv> = HtmlSerializer.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.serialize(<jv>map</jv>);
115 *
116 *    <jc>// HTML elements can be nested arbitrarily deep</jc>
117 *    <jc>// Produces: </jc>
118 *    <jc>//   &lt;table&gt; </jc>
119 *    <jc>//      &lt;tr&gt;&lt;th&gt;key&lt;/th&gt;&lt;th&gt;value&lt;/th&gt;&lt;/tr&gt; </jc>
120 *    <jc>//      &lt;tr&gt;&lt;td&gt;foo&lt;/td&gt;&lt;td&gt;bar&lt;/td&gt;&lt;/tr&gt; </jc>
121 *    <jc>//      &lt;tr&gt;&lt;td&gt;baz&lt;/td&gt;&lt;td&gt;123&lt;/td&gt;&lt;/tr&gt; </jc>
122 *    <jc>//      &lt;tr&gt;&lt;td&gt;someNumbers&lt;/td&gt;&lt;td&gt;&lt;ul&gt;&lt;li&gt;1&lt;li&gt;2&lt;li&gt;3&lt;/ul&gt;&lt;/td&gt;&lt;/tr&gt; </jc>
123 *    <jc>//      &lt;tr&gt;&lt;td&gt;someSubMap&lt;/td&gt;&lt;td&gt; </jc>
124 *    <jc>//         &lt;table&gt; </jc>
125 *    <jc>//            &lt;tr&gt;&lt;th&gt;key&lt;/th&gt;&lt;th&gt;value&lt;/th&gt;&lt;/tr&gt; </jc>
126 *    <jc>//            &lt;tr&gt;&lt;td&gt;a&lt;/td&gt;&lt;td&gt;b&lt;/td&gt;&lt;/tr&gt; </jc>
127 *    <jc>//         &lt;/table&gt; </jc>
128 *    <jc>//      &lt;/td&gt;&lt;/tr&gt; </jc>
129 *    <jc>//   &lt;/table&gt; </jc>
130 *    Map <jv>map</jv> = JsonMap.<jsm>ofText</jsm>(<js>"{foo:'bar',baz:123}"</js>);
131 *    <jv>map</jv>.put(<js>"someNumbers"</js>, JsonList.<jsm>of</jsm>(1, 2, 3));
132 *    <jv>map</jv>.put(<js>"someSubMap"</js>, JsonMap.<jsm>ofText</jsm>(<js>"{a:'b'}"</js>));
133 *    String <jv>html</jv> = HtmlSerializer.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.serialize(<jv>map</jv>);
134 * </p>
135 *
136 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
137 *    <li class='note'>This class is thread safe and reusable.
138 * </ul>
139 *
140 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
141 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/HtmlBasics">HTML Basics</a>
142
143 * </ul>
144 */
145@SuppressWarnings({
146   "java:S110", // Inheritance depth acceptable for this class hierarchy
147   "java:S115", // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase naming convention
148})
149public class HtmlSerializer extends XmlSerializer implements HtmlMetaProvider {
150
151   // Property name constants
152   private static final String PROP_addBeanTypesHtml = "addBeanTypesHtml";
153   private static final String PROP_addKeyValueTableHeaders = "addKeyValueTableHeaders";
154   private static final String PROP_detectLabelParameters = "detectLabelParameters";
155   private static final String PROP_detectLinksInStrings = "detectLinksInStrings";
156   private static final String PROP_labelParameter = "labelParameter";
157   private static final String PROP_uriAnchorText = "uriAnchorText";
158
159   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
160   private static final String ARG_value = "value";
161   private static final String ARG_copyFrom = "copyFrom";
162
163   /**
164    * Builder class.
165    */
166   @SuppressWarnings({
167      "java:S119" // 'SELF' (CRTP self-type) is intentional and clearer than a single-letter name.
168   })
169   public abstract static class Builder<SELF extends Builder<SELF>> extends XmlSerializer.Builder<SELF> {
170
171      private static final Cache<HashKey,HtmlSerializer> CACHE = Cache.of(HashKey.class, HtmlSerializer.class).build();
172
173      private boolean addBeanTypesHtml;
174      private boolean addKeyValueTableHeaders;
175      private boolean disableDetectLabelParameters;
176      private boolean disableDetectLinksInStrings;
177      private String labelParameter;
178      private AnchorText uriAnchorText;
179
180      /**
181       * Constructor, default settings.
182       */
183      protected Builder() {
184         produces("text/html");
185         addBeanTypesHtml = env("HtmlSerializer.addBeanTypesHtml", false);
186         addKeyValueTableHeaders = env("HtmlSerializer.addKeyValueTableHeaders", false);
187         disableDetectLabelParameters = env("HtmlSerializer.disableDetectLabelParameters", false);
188         disableDetectLinksInStrings = env("HtmlSerializer.disableDetectLinksInStrings", false);
189         uriAnchorText = env("HtmlSerializer.uriAnchorText", AnchorText.TO_STRING);
190         labelParameter = env("HtmlSerializer.labelParameter", "label");
191      }
192
193      /**
194       * Copy constructor.
195       *
196       * @param copyFrom The builder to copy from.
197       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
198       */
199      protected Builder(Builder<?> copyFrom) {
200         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
201         addBeanTypesHtml = copyFrom.addBeanTypesHtml;
202         addKeyValueTableHeaders = copyFrom.addKeyValueTableHeaders;
203         disableDetectLabelParameters = copyFrom.disableDetectLabelParameters;
204         disableDetectLinksInStrings = copyFrom.disableDetectLinksInStrings;
205         labelParameter = copyFrom.labelParameter;
206         uriAnchorText = copyFrom.uriAnchorText;
207      }
208
209      /**
210       * Copy constructor.
211       *
212       * @param copyFrom The bean to copy from.
213       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
214       */
215      protected Builder(HtmlSerializer copyFrom) {
216         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
217         addBeanTypesHtml = copyFrom.addBeanTypesHtml;
218         addKeyValueTableHeaders = copyFrom.addKeyValueTableHeaders;
219         disableDetectLabelParameters = ! copyFrom.detectLabelParameters;
220         disableDetectLinksInStrings = ! copyFrom.detectLinksInStrings;
221         labelParameter = copyFrom.labelParameter;
222         uriAnchorText = copyFrom.uriAnchorText;
223      }
224
225      /**
226       * Add <js>"_type"</js> properties when needed.
227       *
228       * <p>
229       * If <jk>true</jk>, then <js>"_type"</js> properties will be added to beans if their type cannot be inferred
230       * through reflection.
231       *
232       * <p>
233       * When present, this value overrides the {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.Serializer.Builder#addBeanTypes()} setting and is
234       * provided to customize the behavior of specific serializers in a {@link SerializerSet}.
235       *
236       * @return This object.
237       */
238      public SELF addBeanTypesHtml() {
239         return addBeanTypesHtml(true);
240      }
241
242      /**
243       * Same as {@link #addBeanTypesHtml()} but allows you to explicitly specify the value.
244       *
245       * @param value The value for this setting.
246       * @return This object.
247       */
248      public SELF addBeanTypesHtml(boolean value) {
249         addBeanTypesHtml = value;
250         return self();
251      }
252
253      /**
254       * <i><l>HtmlSerializer</l> configuration property:&emsp;</i>  Add key/value headers on bean/map tables.
255       *
256       * <p>
257       * When enabled, <bc>key</bc> and <bc>value</bc> column headers are added to tables.
258       *
259       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
260       * <p class='bjson'>
261       *    <jc>// Our bean class.</jc>
262       *    <jk>public class</jk> MyBean {
263       *       <jk>public</jk> String <jf>f1</jf> = <js>"foo"</js>;
264       *       <jk>public</jk> String <jf>f2</jf> = <js>"bar"</js>;
265       *    }
266       *
267       *  <jc>// Serializer without headers.</jc>
268       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer1</jv> = HtmlSerializer.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>;
269       *
270       *  <jc>// Serializer with headers.</jc>
271       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer2</jv> = HtmlSerializer
272       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
273       *       .addKeyValueTableHeaders()
274       *       .build();
275       *
276       *    String <jv>withoutHeaders</jv> = <jv>serializer1</jv>.serialize(<jk>new</jk> MyBean());
277       *    String <jv>withHeaders</jv> = <jv>serializer2</jv>.serialize(<jk>new</jk> MyBean());
278       * </p>
279       *
280       * <p>
281       * The following shows the difference between the two generated outputs:
282       *
283       * <table class='styled'>
284       *    <tr>
285       *       <th><c>withoutHeaders</c></th>
286       *       <th><c>withHeaders</c></th>
287       *    </tr>
288       *    <tr>
289       *       <td>
290       *          <table class='unstyled'>
291       *             <tr><td>f1</td><td>foo</td></tr>
292       *             <tr><td>f2</td><td>bar</td></tr>
293       *          </table>
294       *       </td>
295       *       <td>
296       *          <table class='unstyled'>
297       *             <tr><th>key</th><th>value</th></tr>
298       *             <tr><td>f1</td><td>foo</td></tr>
299       *             <tr><td>f2</td><td>bar</td></tr>
300       *          </table>
301       *       </td>
302       *    </tr>
303       * </table>
304       *
305       * @return This object.
306       */
307      public SELF addKeyValueTableHeaders() {
308         return addKeyValueTableHeaders(true);
309      }
310
311      /**
312       * Same as {@link #addKeyValueTableHeaders()} but allows you to explicitly specify the value.
313       *
314       * @param value The value for this setting.
315       * @return This object.
316       */
317      public SELF addKeyValueTableHeaders(boolean value) {
318         addKeyValueTableHeaders = value;
319         return self();
320      }
321
322      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
323      public HtmlSerializer build() {
324         return cache(CACHE).build(HtmlSerializer.class);
325      }
326
327      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
328      public abstract SELF copy();
329
330      /**
331       * <i><l>HtmlSerializer</l> configuration property:&emsp;</i>  Dont look for link labels in URIs.
332       *
333       * <p>
334       * Disables the feature where if the URL has a label parameter (e.g. <js>"?label=foobar"</js>), then use that as the anchor text of the link.
335       *
336       * <p>
337       * The parameter name can be changed via the {@link #labelParameter(String)} property.
338       *
339       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
340       * <p class='bjson'>
341       *    <jc>// Our bean class with a property containing what looks like a URL.</jc>
342       *    <jk>public class</jk> MyBean {
343       *       <jk>public</jk> URI <jf>f1</jf> = URI.<jsm>create</jsm>(<js>"http://www.apache.org?label=Apache%20Foundation"</js>);
344       *    }
345       *
346       *  <jc>// Serializer with label detection.</jc>
347       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer1</jv> = HtmlSerializer
348       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
349       *       .addKeyValueTableHeaders()
350       *       .build();
351       *
352       *  <jc>// Serializer without label detection.</jc>
353       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer2</jv> = HtmlSerializer
354       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
355       *       .addKeyValueTableHeaders()
356       *       .disableDetectLabelParameters()
357       *       .build();
358       *
359       *    String <jv>withLabels</jv> = <jv>serializer1</jv>.serialize(<jk>new</jk> MyBean());
360       *    String <jv>withoutLabels</jv> = <jv>serializer2</jv>.serialize(<jk>new</jk> MyBean());
361       * </p>
362       *
363       * <p>
364       * The following shows the difference between the two generated outputs.
365       * <br>Note that they're both hyperlinks, but the anchor text differs:
366       *
367       * <table class='styled'>
368       *    <tr>
369       *       <th><c>withLabels</c></th>
370       *       <th><c>withoutLabels</c></th>
371       *    </tr>
372       *    <tr>
373       *       <td>
374       *          <table class='unstyled'>
375       *             <tr><th>key</th><th>value</th></tr>
376       *             <tr><td>f1</td><td><a href='http://www.apache.org?label=Apache%20Foundation'>Apache Foundation</a></td></tr>
377       *          </table>
378       *       </td>
379       *       <td>
380       *          <table class='unstyled'>
381       *             <tr><th>key</th><th>value</th></tr>
382       *             <tr><td>f1</td><td><a href='http://www.apache.org?label=Apache%20Foundation'>http://www.apache.org?label=Apache%20Foundation</a></td></tr>
383       *          </table>
384       *       </td>
385       *    </tr>
386       * </table>
387       *
388       * @return This object.
389       */
390      public SELF disableDetectLabelParameters() {
391         return disableDetectLabelParameters(true);
392      }
393
394      /**
395       * Same as {@link #disableDetectLabelParameters()} but allows you to explicitly specify the value.
396       *
397       * @param value The value for this setting.
398       * @return This object.
399       */
400      public SELF disableDetectLabelParameters(boolean value) {
401         disableDetectLabelParameters = value;
402         return self();
403      }
404
405      /**
406       * <i><l>HtmlSerializer</l> configuration property:&emsp;</i>  Don't look for URLs in {@link String Strings}.
407       *
408       * <p>
409       * Disables the feature where if a string looks like a URL (i.e. starts with <js>"http://"</js> or <js>"https://"</js>, then treat it like a URL
410       * and make it into a hyperlink based on the rules specified by {@link Builder#uriAnchorText(AnchorText)}.
411       *
412       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
413       * <p class='bjson'>
414       *    <jc>// Our bean class with a property containing what looks like a URL.</jc>
415       *    <jk>public class</jk> MyBean {
416       *       <jk>public</jk> String <jf>f1</jf> = <js>"http://www.apache.org"</js>;
417       *    }
418       *
419       *  <jc>// Serializer with link detection.</jc>
420       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer1</jv> = HtmlSerializer
421       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
422       *       .addKeyValueTableHeaders()
423       *       .build();
424       *
425       *  <jc>// Serializer without link detection.</jc>
426       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer2</jv> = HtmlSerializer
427       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
428       *       .addKeyValueTableHeaders()
429       *       .disableDetectLinksInStrings()
430       *       .build();
431       *
432       *    String <jv>withLinks</jv> = <jv>serializer1</jv>.serialize(<jk>new</jk> MyBean());
433       *    String <jv>withoutLinks</jv> = <jv>serializer2</jv>.serialize(<jk>new</jk> MyBean());
434       * </p>
435       *
436       * <p>
437       * The following shows the difference between the two generated outputs:
438       *
439       * <table class='styled'>
440       *    <tr>
441       *       <th><c>withLinks</c></th>
442       *       <th><c>withoutLinks</c></th>
443       *    </tr>
444       *    <tr>
445       *       <td>
446       *          <table class='unstyled'>
447       *             <tr><th>key</th><th>value</th></tr>
448       *             <tr><td>f1</td><td><a href='http://www.apache.org'>http://www.apache.org</a></td></tr>
449       *          </table>
450       *       </td>
451       *       <td>
452       *          <table class='unstyled'>
453       *             <tr><th>key</th><th>value</th></tr>
454       *             <tr><td>f1</td><td>http://www.apache.org</td></tr>
455       *          </table>
456       *       </td>
457       *    </tr>
458       * </table>
459       *
460       * @return This object.
461       */
462      public SELF disableDetectLinksInStrings() {
463         return disableDetectLinksInStrings(true);
464      }
465
466      /**
467       * Same as {@link #disableDetectLinksInStrings()} but allows you to explicitly specify the value.
468       *
469       * @param value The value for this setting.
470       * @return This object.
471       */
472      public SELF disableDetectLinksInStrings(boolean value) {
473         disableDetectLinksInStrings = value;
474         return self();
475      }
476
477      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
478      public HashKey hashKey() {
479         // @formatter:off
480         return HashKey.of(
481            super.hashKey(),
482            addBeanTypesHtml,
483            addKeyValueTableHeaders,
484            disableDetectLabelParameters,
485            disableDetectLinksInStrings,
486            labelParameter,
487            uriAnchorText
488         );
489         // @formatter:on
490      }
491
492      /**
493       * <i><l>HtmlSerializer</l> configuration property:&emsp;</i>  Link label parameter name.
494       *
495       * <p>
496       * The parameter name to look for when resolving link labels}.
497       *
498       * @param value
499       *    The new value for this property.
500       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
501       *    <br>The default is <js>"label"</js>.
502       * @return This object.
503       */
504      public SELF labelParameter(String value) {
505         labelParameter = assertArgNotNull(ARG_value, value);
506         return self();
507      }
508
509      /**
510       * <i><l>HtmlSerializer</l> configuration property:&emsp;</i>  Anchor text source.
511       *
512       * <p>
513       * When creating anchor tags (e.g. <code><xt>&lt;a</xt> <xa>href</xa>=<xs>'...'</xs>
514       * <xt>&gt;</xt>text<xt>&lt;/a&gt;</xt></code>) in HTML, this setting defines what to set the inner text to.
515       *
516       * <p>
517       * The possible values are:
518       * <ul>
519       *    <li class='jc'>{@link AnchorText}
520       *    <ul>
521       *       <li class='jf'>{@link AnchorText#TO_STRING TO_STRING} (default) - Set to whatever is returned by {@link #toString()} on the object.
522       *          <br>
523       *          <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
524       *          <p class='bjson'>
525       *    <jc>// Our bean class with a URI property.</jc>
526       *    <jk>public class</jk> MyBean {
527       *       <jk>public</jk> URI <jf>f1</jf> = URI.<jsm>create</jsm>(<js>"http://www.apache.org?foo=bar#myAnchor"</js>);
528       *    }
529       *
530       *    <jc>// Serializer with TO_STRING anchor text.</jc>
531       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer1</jv> = HtmlSerializer.<jsm>create</jsm>().anchorText(<jsf>TO_STRING</jsf>).build();
532       *
533       *    <jc>// Produces: &lt;a href='http://www.apache.org?foo=bar#myAnchor'&gt;http://www.apache.org?foo=bar#myAnchor&lt;/a&gt;</jc>
534       *    String <jv>html</jv> = <jv>serializer1</jv>.serialize(<jk>new</jk> MyBean());
535       *          </p>
536       *       <li class='jf'>{@link AnchorText#PROPERTY_NAME PROPERTY_NAME} - Set to the bean property name.
537       *          <br>
538       *          <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
539       *          <p class='bjson'>
540       *    <jc>// Our bean class with a URI property.</jc>
541       *    <jk>public class</jk> MyBean {
542       *       <jk>public</jk> URI <jf>f1</jf> = URI.<jsm>create</jsm>(<js>"http://www.apache.org?foo=bar#myAnchor"</js>);
543       *    }
544       *
545       *    <jc>// Serializer with PROPERTY_NAME anchor text.</jc>
546       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer1</jv> = HtmlSerializer.<jsm>create</jsm>().anchorText(<jsf>PROPERTY_NAME</jsf>).build();
547       *
548       *    <jc>// Produces: &lt;a href='http://www.apache.org?foo=bar#myAnchor'&gt;f1&lt;/a&gt;</jc>
549       *    String <jv>html</jv> = <jv>serializer1</jv>.serialize(<jk>new</jk> MyBean());
550       *          </p>
551       *       <li class='jf'>{@link AnchorText#URI URI} - Set to the URI value.
552       *          <br>
553       *          <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
554       *          <p class='bjson'>
555       *    <jc>// Our bean class with a URI property.</jc>
556       *    <jk>public class</jk> MyBean {
557       *       <jk>public</jk> URI <jf>f1</jf> = URI.<jsm>create</jsm>(<js>"http://www.apache.org?foo=bar#myAnchor"</js>);
558       *    }
559       *
560       *    <jc>// Serializer with URI anchor text.</jc>
561       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer1</jv> = HtmlSerializer.<jsm>create</jsm>().anchorText(<jsf>URI</jsf>).build();
562       *
563       *    <jc>// Produces: &lt;a href='http://www.apache.org?foo=bar#myAnchor'&gt;http://www.apache.org?foo=bar&lt;/a&gt;</jc>
564       *    String <jv>html</jv> = <jv>serializer1</jv>.serialize(<jk>new</jk> MyBean());
565       *          </p>
566       *       <li class='jf'>{@link AnchorText#LAST_TOKEN LAST_TOKEN} - Set to the last token of the URI value.
567       *          <br>
568       *          <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
569       *          <p class='bjson'>
570       *    <jc>// Our bean class with a URI property.</jc>
571       *    <jk>public class</jk> MyBean {
572       *       <jk>public</jk> URI <jf>f1</jf> = URI.<jsm>create</jsm>(<js>"http://www.apache.org/foo/bar?baz=qux#myAnchor"</js>);
573       *    }
574       *
575       *    <jc>// Serializer with LAST_TOKEN anchor text.</jc>
576       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer1</jv> = HtmlSerializer.<jsm>create</jsm>().anchorText(<jsf>LAST_TOKEN</jsf>).build();
577       *
578       *    <jc>// Produces: &lt;a href='http://www.apache.org/foo/bar?baz=qux#myAnchor'&gt;bar&lt;/a&gt;</jc>
579       *    String <jv>html</jv> = <jv>serializer1</jv>.serialize(<jk>new</jk> MyBean());
580       *          </p>
581       *       <li class='jf'>{@link AnchorText#URI_ANCHOR URI_ANCHOR} - Set to the anchor of the URL.
582       *          <br>
583       *          <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
584       *          <p class='bjson'>
585       *    <jc>// Our bean class with a URI property.</jc>
586       *    <jk>public class</jk> MyBean {
587       *       <jk>public</jk> URI <jf>f1</jf> = URI.<jsm>create</jsm>(<js>"http://www.apache.org/foo/bar?baz=qux#myAnchor"</js>);
588       *    }
589       *
590       *    <jc>// Serializer with URI_ANCHOR anchor text.</jc>
591       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer1</jv> = HtmlSerializer.<jsm>create</jsm>().anchorText(<jsf>URI_ANCHOR</jsf>).build();
592       *
593       *    <jc>// Produces: &lt;a href='http://www.apache.org/foo/bar?baz=qux#myAnchor'&gt;myAnchor&lt;/a&gt;</jc>
594       *    String <jv>html</jv> = <jv>serializer1</jv>.serialize(<jk>new</jk> MyBean());
595       *          </p>
596       *       <li class='jf'>{@link AnchorText#CONTEXT_RELATIVE CONTEXT_RELATIVE} - Same as {@link AnchorText#TO_STRING TO_STRING} but assumes it's a context-relative path.
597       *          <br>
598       *          <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
599       *          <p class='bjson'>
600       *    <jc>// Our bean class with a URI property.</jc>
601       *    <jk>public class</jk> MyBean {
602       *       <jk>public</jk> URI <jf>f1</jf> = URI.<jsm>create</jsm>(<js>"bar/baz"</js>);
603       *    }
604       *
605       *    <jc>// Serializer with CONTEXT_RELATIVE anchor text.</jc>
606       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer1</jv> = HtmlSerializer
607       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
608       *       .anchorText(<jsf>CONTEXT_RELATIVE</jsf>)
609       *       .uriResolution(<jsf>ROOT_RELATIVE</jsf>)
610       *       .uriRelativity(<jsf>RESOURCE</jsf>)
611       *       .uriContext(<js>"{authority:'http://localhost:10000',contextRoot:'/myContext',servletPath:'/myServlet',pathInfo:'/foo'}"</js>)
612       *       .build();
613       *
614       *    <jc>// Produces: &lt;a href&#61;'/myContext/myServlet/bar/baz'&gt;myServlet/bar/baz&lt;/a&gt;</jc>
615       *    String <jv>html</jv> = <jv>serializer1</jv>.serialize(<jk>new</jk> MyBean());
616       *          </p>
617       *       <li class='jf'>{@link AnchorText#SERVLET_RELATIVE SERVLET_RELATIVE} - Same as {@link AnchorText#TO_STRING TO_STRING} but assumes it's a servlet-relative path.
618       *          <br>
619       *          <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
620       *          <p class='bjson'>
621       *    <jc>// Our bean class with a URI property.</jc>
622       *    <jk>public class</jk> MyBean {
623       *       <jk>public</jk> URI <jf>f1</jf> = URI.<jsm>create</jsm>(<js>"bar/baz"</js>);
624       *    }
625       *
626       *    <jc>// Serializer with SERVLET_RELATIVE anchor text.</jc>
627       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer1</jv> = HtmlSerializer
628       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
629       *       .anchorText(<jsf>SERVLET_RELATIVE</jsf>)
630       *       .uriResolution(<jsf>ROOT_RELATIVE</jsf>)
631       *       .uriRelativity(<jsf>RESOURCE</jsf>)
632       *       .uriContext(<js>"{authority:'http://localhost:10000',contextRoot:'/myContext',servletPath:'/myServlet',pathInfo:'/foo'}"</js>)
633       *       .build();
634       *
635       *    <jc>// Produces: &lt;a href&#61;'/myContext/myServlet/bar/baz'&gt;bar/baz&lt;/a&gt;</jc>
636       *    String <jv>html</jv> = <jv>serializer1</jv>.serialize(<jk>new</jk> MyBean());
637       *          </p>
638       *       <li class='jf'>{@link AnchorText#PATH_RELATIVE PATH_RELATIVE} - Same as {@link AnchorText#TO_STRING TO_STRING} but assumes it's a path-relative path.
639       *          <br>
640       *          <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
641       *          <p class='bjson'>
642       *    <jc>// Our bean class with a URI property.</jc>
643       *    <jk>public class</jk> MyBean {
644       *       <jk>public</jk> URI <jf>f1</jf> = URI.<jsm>create</jsm>(<js>"bar/baz"</js>);
645       *    }
646       *
647       *    <jc>// Serializer with PATH_RELATIVE anchor text.</jc>
648       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer1</jv> = HtmlSerializer
649       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
650       *       .anchorText(<jsf>PATH_RELATIVE</jsf>)
651       *       .uriResolution(<jsf>ROOT_RELATIVE</jsf>)
652       *       .uriRelativity(<jsf>PATH_INFO</jsf>)
653       *       .uriContext(<js>"{authority:'http://localhost:10000',contextRoot:'/myContext',servletPath:'/myServlet',pathInfo:'/foo'}"</js>)
654       *       .build();
655       *
656       *    <jc>// Produces: &lt;a href&#61;'/myContext/myServlet/foo/bar/baz'&gt;bar/baz&lt;/a&gt;</jc>
657       *    String <jv>html</jv> = <jv>serializer1</jv>.serialize(<jk>new</jk> MyBean());
658       *          </p>
659       *    </ul>
660       * </ul>
661       *
662       * @param value
663       *    The new value for this property.
664       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
665       *    <br>The default is {@link AnchorText#TO_STRING}.
666       * @return This object.
667       */
668      public SELF uriAnchorText(AnchorText value) {
669         uriAnchorText = assertArgNotNull(ARG_value, value);
670         return self();
671      }
672
673
674   }
675
676   /**
677    * Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed {@link HtmlSerializer#create()} / {@link HtmlSerializer#copy()} path.
678    */
679   public static final class DefaultBuilder extends Builder<DefaultBuilder> {
680
681      DefaultBuilder() {}
682
683      DefaultBuilder(HtmlSerializer copyFrom) {
684         super(copyFrom);
685      }
686
687      DefaultBuilder(Builder<?> copyFrom) {
688         super(copyFrom);
689      }
690
691      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
692      public DefaultBuilder copy() {
693         return new DefaultBuilder(this);
694      }
695   }
696
697   /** Default serializer, single quotes. */
698   public static class Sq extends HtmlSerializer {
699
700      /**
701       * Constructor.
702       *
703       * @param builder The builder for this object.
704       */
705      public Sq(Builder<?> builder) {
706         super(builder.quoteChar('\''));
707      }
708   }
709
710   /** Default serializer, single quotes, whitespace added. */
711   public static class SqReadable extends HtmlSerializer {
712
713      /**
714       * Constructor.
715       *
716       * @param builder The builder for this object.
717       */
718      public SqReadable(Builder<?> builder) {
719         super(builder.quoteChar('\'').useWhitespace());
720      }
721   }
722
723   /** Default serializer, all default settings. */
724   public static final HtmlSerializer DEFAULT = new HtmlSerializer(create());
725
726   /** Default serializer, single quotes. */
727   public static final HtmlSerializer DEFAULT_SQ = new HtmlSerializer.Sq(create());
728   /** Default serializer, single quotes, whitespace added. */
729   public static final HtmlSerializer DEFAULT_SQ_READABLE = new HtmlSerializer.SqReadable(create());
730
731   /** Default serializer, single quotes, simplified (no JSON type tags on strings). */
732   public static final HtmlSerializer DEFAULT_SIMPLE_SQ = new HtmlSerializer(create().sq().disableJsonTags());
733
734   /**
735    * Creates a new builder for this object.
736    *
737    * @return A new builder.
738    */
739   @SuppressWarnings({
740      "java:S1452" // Builder<?> wildcard return intentional; callers chain via fluent API without needing the concrete type
741   })
742   public static Builder<?> create() {
743      return new DefaultBuilder();
744   }
745
746   protected final boolean addBeanTypesHtml;
747   protected final boolean addKeyValueTableHeaders;
748   protected final boolean detectLabelParameters;
749   protected final boolean detectLinksInStrings;
750   protected final AnchorText uriAnchorText;
751   protected final String labelParameter;
752
753   private final Map<ClassMeta<?>,HtmlClassMeta> htmlClassMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
754   private final Map<BeanPropertyMeta,HtmlBeanPropertyMeta> htmlBeanPropertyMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
755
756   private final AtomicReference<HtmlSchemaSerializer> schemaSerializer = new AtomicReference<>();
757
758   /**
759    * Constructor.
760    *
761    * @param builder The builder for this object.
762    */
763   public HtmlSerializer(Builder<?> builder) {
764      super(builder);
765      addBeanTypesHtml = builder.addBeanTypesHtml;
766      addKeyValueTableHeaders = builder.addKeyValueTableHeaders;
767      detectLabelParameters = ! builder.disableDetectLabelParameters;
768      detectLinksInStrings = ! builder.disableDetectLinksInStrings;
769      labelParameter = builder.labelParameter;
770      uriAnchorText = builder.uriAnchorText;
771   }
772
773   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
774   public Builder<?> copy() {
775      return new DefaultBuilder(this);
776   }
777
778   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
779   public HtmlSerializerSession.Builder<?> createSession() {
780      return HtmlSerializerSession.create(this);
781   }
782
783   @Override /* Overridden from HtmlMetaProvider */
784   public HtmlBeanPropertyMeta getHtmlBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm) {
785      if (bpm == null)
786         return HtmlBeanPropertyMeta.DEFAULT;
787      return htmlBeanPropertyMetas.computeIfAbsent(bpm, k -> new HtmlBeanPropertyMeta(k.getDelegateFor(), this.getAnnotationProvider(), this));
788   }
789
790   @Override /* Overridden from HtmlMetaProvider */
791   public HtmlClassMeta getHtmlClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
792      return htmlClassMetas.computeIfAbsent(cm, k -> new HtmlClassMeta(k, this));
793   }
794
795   /**
796    * Returns the schema serializer.
797    *
798    * @return The schema serializer.
799    */
800   public HtmlSerializer getSchemaSerializer() {
801      HtmlSchemaSerializer result = schemaSerializer.get();
802      if (result == null) {
803         result = HtmlSchemaSerializer.create().marshallingContext(getMarshallingContext()).build();
804         if (! schemaSerializer.compareAndSet(null, result)) {
805            result = schemaSerializer.get();
806         }
807      }
808      return result;
809   }
810
811   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
812   public HtmlSerializerSession getSession() { return createSession().build(); }
813
814   /**
815    * Link label parameter name.
816    *
817    * @see Builder#labelParameter(String)
818    * @return
819    *    The parameter name to look for when resolving link labels.
820    */
821   protected final String getLabelParameter() { return labelParameter; }
822
823   /**
824    * Anchor text source.
825    *
826    * @see Builder#uriAnchorText(AnchorText)
827    * @return
828    *    When creating anchor tags (e.g. <code><xt>&lt;a</xt> <xa>href</xa>=<xs>'...'</xs>
829    *    <xt>&gt;</xt>text<xt>&lt;/a&gt;</xt></code>) in HTML, this setting defines what to set the inner text to.
830    */
831   protected final AnchorText getUriAnchorText() { return uriAnchorText; }
832
833   /**
834    * Add <js>"_type"</js> properties when needed.
835    *
836    * @see Builder#addBeanTypesHtml()
837    * @return
838    *    <jk>true</jk> if <js>"_type"</js> properties will be added to beans if their type cannot be inferred
839    *    through reflection.
840    */
841   @Override
842   protected final boolean isAddBeanTypes() { return addBeanTypesHtml || super.isAddBeanTypes(); }
843
844   /**
845    * Add key/value headers on bean/map tables.
846    *
847    * @see Builder#addKeyValueTableHeaders()
848    * @return
849    *    <jk>true</jk> if <bc>key</bc> and <bc>value</bc> column headers are added to tables.
850    */
851   protected final boolean isAddKeyValueTableHeaders() { return addKeyValueTableHeaders; }
852
853   /**
854    * Look for link labels in URIs.
855    *
856    * @see Builder#disableDetectLabelParameters()
857    * @return
858    *    <jk>true</jk> if we should look for URL label parameters (e.g. <js>"?label=foobar"</js>).
859    */
860   protected final boolean isDetectLabelParameters() { return detectLabelParameters; }
861
862   /**
863    * Look for URLs in {@link String Strings}.
864    *
865    * @see Builder#disableDetectLinksInStrings()
866    * @return
867    *    <jk>true</jk> if we should automatically convert strings to URLs if they look like a URL.
868    */
869   protected final boolean isDetectLinksInStrings() { return detectLinksInStrings; }
870
871   @Override /* Overridden from XmlSerializer */
872   protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
873      return super.properties()
874         .a(PROP_addBeanTypesHtml, addBeanTypesHtml)
875         .a(PROP_addKeyValueTableHeaders, addKeyValueTableHeaders)
876         .a(PROP_detectLabelParameters, detectLabelParameters)
877         .a(PROP_detectLinksInStrings, detectLinksInStrings)
878         .a(PROP_labelParameter, labelParameter)
879         .a(PROP_uriAnchorText, uriAnchorText);
880   }
881}
